action_items.action: CRITICAL — Sprint 169 Release Hold STILL ACTIVE. GDCU-8842 (Integrate Genesis Content Layouts) remains In Progress (Harden Thomas Wallace, last updated 12:36 BST) — the publish hold called by Nebojsa Stanic at 08:29 BST this morning has not been lifted. GDCU-8834 (Cool Tones QA failure) also still In Progress (12:37 BST). Chase Nebojsa/Harden for ETA on when publish can resume. Confirm whether both items need to land before the hold lifts.

ESCALATE NOW — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign, Day 15 Blocked. Blocker NOW IDENTIFIED: Chloe Christie confirmed on 2026-04-15 that this is 'Blocked while awaiting feedback from Michael Butlin.' Ticket last updated 12:37 BST today. The unresolved item is NOT with Ciara — escalate directly to Michael Butlin today. This is sprint week 15 of a carry item.

RESOLVED THIS AFTERNOON — GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System moved to Done at 12:24 BST (Ciara Carroll). This was the Highest priority item in the morning report. Follow-up still needed: confirm Ciara has posted the Claude Design Guidelines announcement in #gdc/#core-product/#language/#pod/#ai-chatter — the promised 'first thing' post from 2026-04-29 was still missing at 08:45 BST. Now the ticket is done, the announcement should follow. Review and endorse publicly.

Review and sign off GDCU-8736 Learning Hub Imagery (Ciara Carroll, In Product, Medium). This is now the ONLY outstanding In Product item other than GDCU-8619. Ciara had ticket activity at 12:35 BST today — check for any new comments or prototype updates. Figma prototypes previously shared by Ciara (both page variants): sign off to unblock Carlos Blauth's dev work on GDCU-8733 (Apply Feedback to Learning Hub, still In Progress).

NEW — GDCU-8907 🔥 Implement Betting Tips Hub Page (Sanja Budic, In Progress). Dev implementation of the Betting Tips Hub has started — updated 08:07 BST today. Design handoff source is GDCU-8512 (Miguel Migneco — now Done at 12:26 BST). Confirm with Sanja that the design handoff from GDCU-8512 was complete and sufficient before dev proceeds further. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Miguel Migneco, Michael Butlin, Dan Smullen.

SPRINT RELEASE IMPACT — GDCU-8834 Implement Fixes for Cool Tones Update (Harden Thomas Wallace) still In Progress (12:37 BST). This QA failure from 2026-04-29 18:31 is likely contributing to the Sprint 169 publish hold. Multiple visual/contrast issues across CA/FR tables, toast messages, buttons, navigation boxes. Monitor for move to In QA/Done today.

Chase Jessica Dordevic: GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card still In Progress (12:37 BST) and GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match still In Progress (12:35 BST) — both bounced from In Product yesterday and have not re-entered review. GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners also In Progress (12:51 BST). Check in with Jessica on progress for all three, particularly whether 8879 and 8546 are close to re-submission.

NEW — GDCU-8940 Implement Gamified Tinder Style Widget PLACEHOLDER was CANCELLED today at 13:16 BST (unassigned, Medium). Likely superseded by the active design in GDCU-8546 (Tinder Style Offer Match, Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Verify with Gabriel Cornoiu or Chloe Christie if this cancellation was expected or accidental.

Vic Dadson still on sick leave — signed off for a fortnight from ~2026-04-21, expected back ~2026-05-05 (next Tuesday). No change. Plan for her return: data engineering options discussion still outstanding. No action needed today unless cover is required.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub UX pre-req ticket still not created. Ticket states the UX ticket must be completed and approved before this ticket is actioned. Create the UX pre-req or formally validate scope with Chloe and Gab before next sprint planning.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8846 Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Campaign (Ciara Carroll, To Do). Creative direction needed from Mike before Ciara can proceed. Josh Kerr feedback: needs rethinking — clearer message, less 'gaming' feel. Sign off on direction when bandwidth allows.

CARRY FORWARD — Gabriel Cornoiu outstanding intake questions (last DM 2026-04-23): (1) 'Other' option in offer ordering dropdown behaviour, (2) 'new OpList' clarification. Respond when opportunity arises.
